title: Seattle: Magnuson Park Pt. 6 – Kite Hill Area | Park Preview
content: # Park Preview. # Seattle: Magnuson Park Pt. 6 – Kite Hill Area. ##### Lake Washington Views of Mt. Rainier Offleash Dog Beach Swimming Area Kite Flying Paved Walking Paths. The Kite Hill area of Magnuson Park is the heart of the park. It was the first section fully developed by the City of Seattle for public use, primarily due to its lake access and the fact that this section of Sand Point was already a recreation area for Naval Air Station personnel. It’s at the end of a paved path heading east from the road towards the park promenade and lake. The stretch of park from here to Kite Hill, along the east side of the road, is a wide swath of lawn split by the paved park promenade closer to the lake. Kite Hill rises up from the north side of the parking lot at the end of Lake Shore Drive. At the base of the hill, the road that was Lake Shore Drive is closed to vehicles and becomes the start of a paved walking path loop.

title: Go fly a kite! - Review of Gas Works Park, Seattle, WA - Tripadvisor
content: Great place to take the kids, fly kites and plenty of running space. Sit and watch sea planes take off and land. Beautiful place to see the Seattle skyline.
